title: Hybrid scorer full-test confirmation

queries: stage3 full-test confirmation subset promotable candidate global replay confirm hybrid scorer
machine learning full test confirmation after subset screening promotable replay control

papers.title: N/A
papers.claim: This is a repository-result confirmation bundle rather than a new modeling idea.
papers.relevance: Used to verify that the subset-promotable hybrid scorer survives full-test confirmation before any repo-facing claim.

evidence.why_now: EXP099 replayed the hybrid scorer and moved all three representative tasks above their stored strict screening baselines. Stage 3 workflow now requires full-test confirmation before any repo-facing claim or later commit/push decision.

hypothesis: If the hybrid scorer is a real cross-task gain rather than a subset-only effect, the replay-confirmed bundle should remain non-regressive across user-churn, user-ltv, and item-incoterms when final test evaluation is expanded from the subset to the full split.
notes: Repository-result confirmation only. No new modeling, loss, sampling, or packaging change is allowed.
Keep the replay-confirmed hybrid scorer fixed and change only the final test evaluation scope via test_steps=-1.
Stopped by user decision on 2026-05-08 after full-test wall-clock imbalance became too large for the single-GPU item-incoterms leg.
Use this bundle only as a fixed-hyperparameter full-test control point, not as the new mainline retune path.
